ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { message: "Reconciliation complete", reconciliationId: vars.reconciliationId, summary: vars.reconResult.summary }

logger.doc:name: Log reconciliation complete
logger.message: #[output text/plain --- "Nightly reconciliation complete. created=" ++ (vars.reconResult.summary.missingCount as String) ++ " updated=" ++ (vars.reconResult.summary.staleCount as String) ++ " disabled=" ++ (vars.reconResult.summary.orphanedCount as String) ++ " reconciliationId=" ++ vars.reconciliationId]

logger.doc:name: Log reconciliation error
logger.message: #[output text/plain --- "Nightly reconciliation job failed. error=" ++ error.description ++ " reconciliationId=" ++ (vars.reconciliationId default "UNKNOWN")]

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query all active Salesforce Accounts
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Phone, Website FROM Account WHERE IsDeleted = false ORDER BY LastModifiedDate ASC

logger.doc:name: Log SF query result
logger.message: #[output text/plain --- "Salesforce accounts fetched. count=" ++ sizeOf(vars.sfAccounts default []) as String ++ " reconciliationId=" ++ vars.reconciliationId]

http:request.doc:name: Query ERPNext Customers with Salesforce ID

logger.doc:name: Log ERP query result
logger.message: #[output text/plain --- "ERPNext customers fetched. count=" ++ sizeOf(vars.erpCustomers default []) as String ++ " reconciliationId=" ++ vars.reconciliationId]

logger.doc:name: Log reconciliation summary
logger.message: #[output text/plain --- "Reconciliation diff computed. missing=" ++ (vars.reconResult.summary.missingCount as String) ++ " stale=" ++ (vars.reconResult.summary.staleCount as String) ++ " orphaned=" ++ (vars.reconResult.summary.orphanedCount as String) ++ " reconciliationId=" ++ vars.reconciliationId]

logger.doc:name: Log creating missing record
logger.message: #[output text/plain --- "Reconciliation: creating missing ERP record. recordId=" ++ vars.recordId ++ " correlationId=" ++ vars.correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log updating stale record
logger.message: #[output text/plain --- "Reconciliation: updating stale ERP record. recordId=" ++ vars.recordId ++ " correlationId=" ++ vars.correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log orphaned record
logger.message: #[output text/plain --- "Reconciliation: disabling orphaned ERP customer — no matching active SF Account. erpName=" ++ (vars.orphanErpName default "UNKNOWN") ++ " custom_salesforce_id=" ++ (payload.custom_salesforce_id default "UNKNOWN") ++ " reconciliationId=" ++ vars.reconciliationId]

logger.doc:name: Log orphan disabled
logger.message: #[output text/plain --- "Reconciliation: ERP customer disabled. erpName=" ++ (vars.orphanErpName default "UNKNOWN") ++ " reconciliationId=" ++ vars.reconciliationId]
